snapshot.description: Refactor login_page.dart BlocListener to use NotificationFactory. Update AuthCubit to detect network errors (SocketException) vs auth errors. Integrate ConnectivityBanner into main.dart app shell.
snapshot.title: Integrate NotificationFactory into Login and refactor AuthCubit error handling

changes.newValue:
1. Refactor AuthCubit: add network error detection (SocketException, etc.)
2. Refactor login_page.dart: replace raw SnackBar with NotificationFactory calls
3. Integrate ConnectivityCubit + ConnectivityBanner into main.dart
4. Run flutter analyze on all changed files

changes.newValue: Refactored AuthCubit with AuthErrorWithType state + NotificationType enum. Added network error detection (SocketException, timeout, host lookup). Refactored login_page.dart to use NotificationFactory. Integrated ConnectivityCubit + ConnectivityBanner into main.dart. Updated auth_provider.dart to handle AuthErrorWithType. All 8 files pass flutter analyze.
